mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO mat_purchase_order_item ( id, tenant_id, order_id, request_item_id, wbs_task_id, budget_line_id, project_id, material_id, material_name, specification, unit, quantity, unit_price, amount, received_quantity, created_by, updated_by, deleted_flag, remark, version ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.tenantId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.requestItemId}, #{item.wbsTaskId}, #{item.budgetLineId}, #{item.projectId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.unit}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.amount}, #{item.receivedQuantity}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedBy}, 0, #{item.remark}, 0 )
